SRC-D9298F7E05CD-BND: Communication boundary: Citizen-record action cannot proceed from empathy, constituent pressure, or prior case notes; current authority must close the exact boundary. The exact action boundary is: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: interagency data share.
